Localization.Description: Detection of attempts to start the administrative utility PsExec or similar utilities

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The process {object.process.name} was started with {object.account.name} privileges using the PsExec administration utility or its equivalent on the host {event_src.host}
An analog of the PsExec administration utility ({object.process.name}) is started on host {event_src.host}
The administrative utility PsExec ({object.process.name}) utility is started on host {event_src.host}
The administrative utility PsExec service {object.name} is started on host {event_src.host}
